task_completion.description: Verify the agent has logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main interface or administration dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Custom Fields settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Custom Fields' settings page under Administration > Workspace > Settings > Accounts is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON configuration includes the correct key, type, and visibility settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON input area shows a configuration containing the key 'department', 'type' set to 'select', 'required' set to true, and 'public' set to true.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON configuration includes the correct options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON input area shows the options 'Engineering', 'Product', 'Sales', and 'Marketing' configured for the dropdown.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON configuration includes the correct default value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON input area shows the default value (e.g., 'defaultValue') set to 'Engineering'.

task_completion.description: Verify the custom field configuration has been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save changes' button being clicked, a success toast notification, or the 'Save changes' button is disabled/greyed out indicating the current JSON text is saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser is open showing the Rocket.Chat interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration is entered into the Rocket.Chat Custom Fields text area, not a separate text editor or local file.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration is written in valid JSON format.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text entered in the Custom Fields box uses proper JSON syntax (curly braces, quoted keys, etc.) as required by Rocket.Chat.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom field configuration must be valid JSON and include: key 'department', type 'select', options ['Engineering', 'Product', 'Sales', 'Marketing'], and default value 'Engineering'. It must also be set as required and public.
